Flow.description: Displays a list of Risk Register records, enabling Viewing and Editing of records for the Monthly and Adhoc reporting of risks and issues

formulas.name: fla_NilRisksReasonHTMLCheck
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!f_nr})), FIND("<", {!f_nr}) > 0, FIND(">", {!f_nr}, FIND("<", {!f_nr})) > FIND("<", {!f_nr}), OR( CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"
"), CONTAINS({!f_nr},"

formulas.name: flaMonthPriorStartDate
formulas.expression: DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, 12, MONTH(TODAY()) - 1), 1 )

Flow.interviewLabel: GMS - Risk Register View and Edit {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: GMS - Risk Register View and Edit

recordLookups.name: Get_Selected_Risk_for_Edit_Again
recordLookups.label: Get Selected Risk for Edit Again

fields.name: Risk_Declaration_Text
fields.fieldText:
Declaration of No Risks – {!flaMonthPriorName}


I confirm that no new risks or issues have been identified during the reporting period and there are no updates to report on any existing records of risk previously reported.

fields.name: Provide_Reason_Text
fields.fieldText: Please provide a reason why no risks were reported this month.

validationRule.errorMessage: HTML tags are not supported in this field — please remove any tags and try again.

fields.name: No_Risk_Register_Heading
fields.fieldText: Risk Register Reports for {!flaMonthPriorName} / {!flaCurrentMonthName}

fields.name: No_Risks_Reported
fields.fieldText: No Risk Register records have been reported this month

fields.name: Create_New_Risk_Register_record
fields.fieldText: Would you like to create any new Risk Register records for this month?

fields.name: FurtherReportsConfirmation
fields.fieldText: Please confirm that you have no further Risks or Issues to record for this month

fields.name: Record_Heading
fields.fieldText: Risk Register Records for {!varReportingPeriodMonthName} / {!varCurrentMonthName}

fields.name: Select_to_review
fields.fieldText: To ensure accuracy before submitting your monthly report, please select a record from the list to review a summary of the risk or issue submission

fields.name: Case_Details_Header
fields.fieldText: ﻿Risk Register Record Details (Read Only)

fields.name: View_Probability
fields.helpText: Displays the percentage based on the Likelihood that the risk will occur during the lifetime of the activity

fields.name: Likelihood_Score
fields.helpText: Likelihood Score as per the scoring matrix

fields.name: Impact_Score
fields.helpText: Impact Score as per the scoring matrix

fields.name: Score
fields.helpText: The overall risk score is auto calculated from the Impact score multiplied by the Likelihood score, as per the scoring matrix

fields.name: CreateNewReports_text
fields.fieldText: Would you like to create any new Risk Register records for this month?

subflows.name: Create_Risks_and_Issues
subflows.label: Create and Edit Risks and Issues

subflows.name: Edit_Risks_and_Issues
subflows.label: Create and Edit Risks and Issues
